en_title: As Sony Kills Physical PS5 Games, Disc Production Factory Workers Are Set to be Reassigned
cn_title: 索尼停产PS5实体游戏，光盘厂员工将被转岗
subtitle: 光盘线换跑道
opus_summary: 索尼宣布2028年起新PS5游戏将全面数字化后，奥地利Thalgau光盘工厂员工将转向微光学产品生产。该厂目前每天生产60万张光盘，其中一半来自PS5游戏。

paragraphs.en: Sony has already begun plans to reassign staff at a major disc production plant, following its decision to kill off production of physical PS5 games.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼决定停止生产PS5实体游戏后，已经开始计划重新安排一家大型光盘生产工厂的员工。

paragraphs.en: While Sony has said that all new PS5 games will go digital-only from January 2028 , hundreds of employees at the company's disc factory in Thalgau, Austria are now set to be retrained — sparking questions over whether Sony will begin damping down disc launches sooner.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼曾表示，从2028年1月起，所有新PS5游戏都将只提供数字版；而现在，这家公司位于奥地利Thalgau的光盘工厂中，数百名员工将接受再培训。这也引发疑问：索尼是否会更早开始压低光盘发行量。

paragraphs.en: Currently, an astonishing 600,000 discs are made at Sony's factory every day, with PS5 games accounting for half of its total output. But this figure will soon be slashed dramatically, and staff instead put to work on manufacturing something else: optical microlenses.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，索尼这家工厂每天生产惊人的60万张光盘，其中PS5游戏占总产量的一半。但这个数字很快将被大幅削减，员工则会转去生产另一种东西：光学微透镜。

paragraphs.en: "PlayStation currently accounts for approximately 50 percent of our volume, and of that, approximately 20 percent are new orders," Dietmar Tanzer, CEO of Sony DADC [Digital Audio Disc Corporation] told local news source Salzburg ORF . "We are talking about roughly 10 percent of the volume in 2028."
paragraphs.cn: 索尼DADC（Digital Audio Disc Corporation）首席执行官Dietmar Tanzer告诉当地新闻媒体Salzburg ORF：「PlayStation目前约占我们产量的50%，其中大约20%是新订单。我们说的是2028年约10%的产量。」

paragraphs.en: Sony's decision sent shockwaves around the industry upon its announcement earlier this week, with a strongly negative response from fans and other developers , and ridicule from celebrities and brands . But amid the complaints and the sense that this is truly the end of an era in video games, the numbers show physical game purchasing declining rapidly year-on-year.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼本周早些时候宣布这一决定后，在行业内引发震动，粉丝和其他开发者反应强烈负面，名人和品牌也加入嘲讽。但在抱怨声以及电子游戏时代确实正在结束的感觉之外，数字显示，实体游戏购买量正在逐年快速下降。

paragraphs.en: Tanzer stated that Sony's decision to go discless won't result in job losses at the Thalgau factory, though its 300-strong staff will go through retraining to instead focus on making "micro optics", such as lenses that can project a car turn signal onto the road.
paragraphs.cn: Tanzer表示，索尼转向无光盘并不会导致Thalgau工厂裁员，不过该厂300名员工将接受再培训，转而专注生产「微光学」产品，例如能够把汽车转向灯投射到路面上的镜片。

paragraphs.en: Analysts have pointed to Sony's announcement about PS5 games going all-digital as evidence that there are no plans for PS6 to support discs, either. This report appears to back this up further, with no suggestion that disc production will ramp up again for the start of Sony's next console generation as the company suggests it won't sell hardware at a significant loss despite the RAMpocalypse .
paragraphs.cn: 分析师已经指出，索尼关于PS5游戏全面数字化的公告，证明PS6也没有支持光盘的计划。这篇报道似乎进一步支持了这一点，因为没有迹象表明，随着索尼下一代主机开始，公司会再次提高光盘产量；与此同时，索尼暗示即便面对RAMpocalypse，也不会以大幅亏损出售硬件。

paragraphs.en: A disc-less PS6 makes sense, analyst Piers Harding-Rolls suggested this week , to keep spiralling component costs down by omitting a disc drive on new hardware. "Sony will be looking for all the ways it can reduce the cost of its next-gen console, and this is an easy win," he wrote.
paragraphs.cn: 分析师Piers Harding-Rolls本周表示，无光驱PS6说得通，因为在新硬件上省去光驱可以压低不断飙升的组件成本。他写道：「索尼会寻找一切办法降低下一代主机成本，而这是一个轻松得手的选择。」

paragraphs.en: "It’s possible that an add-on disc drive could be made available to play older PS4 and PS5 games on disc," Harding-Rolls continued. "Removing the drive will upset some gamers that don’t want to pay for an add-on disc drive (if available) and that want to access their game collections on disc. It may be too impractical or too complex, but some process of transferral for older physical media to a digital license could alleviate some of these issues."
paragraphs.cn: Harding-Rolls继续说：「也许会推出一个外接光驱，用来游玩旧的PS4和PS5实体游戏。移除光驱会让一些玩家不满，他们不想为外接光驱付费（如果有的话），也想访问自己的实体游戏收藏。这可能太不实用，或太复杂，但如果能有某种把旧实体媒介转移为数字许可的流程，或许可以缓解其中一些问题。」

paragraphs.en: Of course, it's likely not just Sony doing away with discs. Microsoft's next-gen Xbox, codenamed Project Helix, will reportedly release without a disc drive . In tandem, Microsoft is said to be exploring a new disc-to-digital feature that would let users put a disc into their console and gain a digital license for the game, giving them the ability to play it without a disc.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，放弃光盘的可能不只是索尼。据报道，微软下一代XBOX，代号Project Helix，也将不带光驱发布。同时，据称微软正在探索一种新的光盘转数字功能，让用户把光盘放入主机后获得该游戏的数字许可，从而无需光盘也能游玩。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
